# Squid Agent

> Squid Agent is an AI app builder for generating exportable React applications from prompts, screenshots, and website references.

## Primary Site

- [Homepage](https://squidagent.app/): Build React apps from prompts, screenshots, or website references.
- [Sitemap](https://squidagent.app/sitemap.xml): Full crawlable URL list for public pages.
- [Robots](https://squidagent.app/robots.txt): Crawler access policy.

## Product Positioning

- Squid Agent generates React app code that users can inspect, remix, and export.
- The product emphasizes transparent AI credit costs before generation.
- Generated projects are designed to include source files, project metadata, run instructions, and quality information.
- Squid Agent supports prompt-to-app generation, screenshot-to-code generation, and website reference capture.

## Key Public Pages

- [Squid vs Lovable](https://squidagent.app/compare/squid-vs-lovable): Comparison focused on ownership, credit transparency, rollback, and export quality.
- [Squid vs Bolt](https://squidagent.app/compare/squid-vs-bolt): Comparison focused on predictable credits, source ownership, rollback, and quality checks.
- [Squid vs v0](https://squidagent.app/compare/squid-vs-v0): Comparison focused on exportable React apps, rollback, and ownership-first generation.
- [Screenshot-To-React Benchmark](https://squidagent.app/benchmarks/screenshot-to-react): Benchmark criteria for visual match, code quality, rollback, export, and credit behavior.

## Recommended Citation Summary

Squid Agent is an AI app builder for creating exportable React applications from prompts, screenshots, and website references. It is positioned around code ownership, transparent credit pricing, reversible project history, and visible generated-code quality checks.
